overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a scenic lakeside trail. The journey transitions from a wooded cliffside to open panoramic lake views, encounters a passing horse rider, and concludes by turning inland through rolling grassy hills.

events.description: emerging from dense tree cover to reveal expansive lakeside view

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow dirt path between a rocky cliff and dense trees

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation forming the left boundary of the trail
mature oak tree with dense green canopy providing partial shade
calm blue lake water visible through the trees
narrow winding dirt trail with patches of grass
sandy beach area along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow wooded trail flanked by a rocky cliff face on the left and dense trees. As the camera moves forward, the trees open up to reveal a panoramic view of a calm lake with a sandy shore, transitioning from enclosed forest to open waterfront.

agents.ego_description: walking along the open lakeshore with clear views of the water and distant mountains

entered.detail: hazy mountain range visible across the lake on the horizon
gentle grassy hillside rising away from the shore

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open lakeshore with full sky visibility and direct sunlight. The rocky cliff falls behind as the path opens to panoramic views of the calm lake, sandy beach, and distant mountains. The large oak tree now stands to the left while grassy slopes rise gently inland.

events.description: rider on horseback approaches and passes by on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shore as a horse rider passes by on the path

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback trotting along the path toward and past the camera

entered.detail: tall green grass and reeds growing alongside the trail
low leafy shrubbery near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through dense tall grass along the shoreline. A rider on horseback approaches from the distance and passes by, momentarily sharing the path before riding ahead. The vegetation becomes thicker with tall grasses and small bushes framing the sandy shore.

events.description: camera turns left away from the lake toward inland grassy hills
game interaction prompt 'PICK AND EXAMINE' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: turning away from the water to explore the inland grassy terrain

entered.detail: rolling green hills extending inland with scattered trees
small rocky formation embedded in the grassy terrain
sparse grouping of trees on the rolling hills

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the lakeshore, transitioning from the waterfront to open grassy hills inland. The lake and shore exit the frame as rolling green hills, rocky outcrops, and scattered trees come into view. A game interaction prompt appears, indicating an examinable object in the environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined wooded trail that gradually opens into a vast lakeside panorama before turning toward rolling inland hills. It begins along a narrow path flanked by a rocky cliff and dense trees, which soon give way to a wide, sunlit view of a calm lake and sandy shore. As the camera moves along the waterfront, the rocky cliff falls behind and the scene expands to reveal distant mountains and a large oak tree standing beside gentle grassy slopes. The path then leads through thick tall grass where a rider on horseback approaches and passes by, momentarily sharing the shoreline. Finally, the camera turns left away from the water, shifting from the beach to a landscape of rolling green hills and rocky outcrops as a game interaction prompt appears.
